title: Any completed (done) status as automation trigger
excerpt: Our team would love to be able to trigger an automation by a status change to a status option of the ‘done/completed’ type (as can be set in status column settings - “Choose which colors indicate that an item is complete…

posts.author: Kos (Kos)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our team would love to be able to trigger an automation by a status change to a status option of the ‘done/completed’ type (as can be set in status column settings - “Choose which colors indicate that an item is completed”). An automation would look like this:

When {Status} changes (from A) to any completed status,
Do X

This is similar to the request to add OR & NOT operators to the automation builder. But this option would make some automations easier to set up and manage.

It would also increase functionality of these ‘done’ statuses. It seems that currently they are only used in combination with the Deadline feauture (and have a satisfying animantion to them).
